---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Zertainity
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.
(e.g. "As a student, I can't easily find careers related to Arts stream because...")

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar implementations, or any other context that helps explain the feature.
